message:
⚡ Fix sidebar sluggishness: pre-compute provider groups, remove counts (#16)

- Pre-compute provider→groups map once during _loadChannels() instead of
  re-scanning all channels on every setState/rebuild
- Remove channel count badges from provider tree items
- Eliminates O(providers × groups × channels) per build

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
